name: @a5c-ai/babysitter-codex
description: Babysitter Codex skill bundle and integration package for OpenAI Codex CLI with SDK-managed process-library bootstrapping, 15 orchestration modes, and BOM-safe SKILL installation

scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cp=require('child_process'); const walk=(dir)=>{for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir)){const file=path.join(dir, entry); const stat=fs.statSync(file); if(stat.isDirectory()) walk(file); else if(file.endsWith('.js')) cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',file],{stdio:'inherit'});}}; ['skills','bin','scripts','test'].forEach((dir)=>{if(fs.existsSync(dir)) walk(dir);});"

author: a5c.ai
